title: Waffle Client
description: Improves performance while adding some QOL features
body:
# Introduction
Waffle Client is a optimization modpacks based on sodium/lithium that gives you top notch optimization while letting you freely edit what mods you want to put inside. We also tried to preserve the look and feel of minecraft and there are no custom content or mechanics added in this modpack. We tried maintaining the look of Minecraft to the best of our ability and you will not be able to tell the difference other than the FPS and other improvements 

## Uses for waffle client
- In modpacks where optimization can be hard and annoying why dont we just get to what we need!
- In everyday play on low-end or high-end devices
- Playing on servers with friends

## Performace Photos
Version 1.21.4 on 12 chunks fancy graphics:
![1030 FPS on 12 chunks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a088b6999fb22afd84982457f10f11e8ad741bcf.png)
optimization improvements from 2-10x!

Version 1.21.4 on MAX render fancy graphics:
![MAX RENDER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e5533ff5c573ced548d25ae83edec524c75d65f.png)

## Disclaimers
**THIS IS A SIDE PROJECT UPDATES WILL COME PERIODICALLY EVERY FEW MONTHS AND MAY NOT HAVE CERTAIN VERSIONS**

**DISCLAIMER I AM NOT THE OWNER AND NOT CLAIMING TO BE THE OWNER OF THESE MODS**
